title: For When You Have Been Hurt by the Church
body: Lord, I have been hurt by the people who are supposed to be Yours. The hypocrisy. The judgment. The way they used Your name to do unkind things. Be with me in the hurt. Do not let me walk away from You because of them. You are bigger than the church. You are older than the church. You are still here, in the quiet, waiting. Amen.
